name: Theme Editor
description: Create, edit and live-preview custom Voiden themes directly from the status bar.
author: Phurpa Tsering
readme:
# Voiden Theme Editor

Create and manage custom color themes for Voiden without leaving the app.

## Features
- Browse all built-in themes with a live color preview mockup
- Create custom themes with a full color picker for every token
- Accent RGB triplets auto-derived when you pick an accent color
- Live preview — see your changes applied to the UI instantly
- Themes saved as JSON files in your Voiden user data directory
- Opened from the status bar (Themes button, right side)

buttons.description: Opens the Theme Editor panel from the status bar

panels.title: Theme Editor
panels.description: Full-screen theme editor rendered as a custom tab

ui.description: Registers a status bar button and a custom panel for the theme editor

features: Browse built-in and custom themes with live color swatch previews
Color picker for every CSS variable (hex, rgba, and RGB triplet formats)
Auto-derives --accent-rgb and --accent-alt-rgb when accent colors change
Live preview mode — applies theme to the running app while editing
Saves custom themes as JSON files to userData/themes/
Status bar entry point — one click to open or focus the editor tab
